content.body: A Knowledge Base (Workspace) is the container for Memory Nodes and Edges, corresponding to an independent knowledge domain or project. Users can create multiple Knowledge Bases. A Knowledge Base has its own sharing level (public / restricted / private), independent from node-level visibility — effective access is the more restrictive of the two. A Knowledge Base may be started blank or bootstrapped from a document with AI extraction. ID format: ws_<hex8>.
